message:
feat(mermaid): add sequence diagram parsing for participants, control blocks, notes, activations (bd-2kn9a)

Enhance the Mermaid sequence diagram parser to handle structured statements:
- participant/actor declarations with aliases
- control blocks: loop, alt, opt, par, critical, break, rect
- else/and alternative sections within blocks
- Note over/right of/left of with participant references
- activate/deactivate for activation bars
- autonumber for message numbering

Control blocks map to IR clusters for layout. Notes become special nodes.
12 new parsing + IR unit tests, 5 new snapshot tests at multiple sizes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
